landing.heroDescription: Get your own hosted agent in 60 seconds. Connect Telegram, Discord, or WhatsApp. Add skills from the marketplace.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up for $9/month. Your agent is provisioned instantly.
landing.step2Desc: Connect Telegram, Discord, or WhatsApp. Add your AI key.
landing.step3Desc: Add skills from the marketplace. Gmail, Calendar, Notion, more.

auth.signInDescription: Enter your email and password to access your account
auth.createAccountDescription: Enter your details to get started with Foyer
auth.name: Name
auth.signInFailed: Account created but sign in failed. Please try logging in.
auth.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

chat.title: Start a conversation
chat.subtitle: Send a message to your AI agent. You can also chat via your configured channel (Telegram, Discord, etc.)
chat.pendingMessage: Configure your agent in Settings and deploy it to start chatting.
chat.provisioningMessage: Your agent is being set up. This usually takes 1-2 minutes.
chat.failedMessage: Agent setup failed. Please check Settings and try redeploying.
chat.welcomeMessage: Your agent is ready. Say hello! 👋

settings.title: Settings
settings.configureFirst: Configure at least one AI provider and a channel to deploy

discord.label: Discord
discord.placeholder: Bot token from Discord Developer Portal

onboarding.chooseChannel: How do you want to interact with your AI agent?
onboarding.chooseProvider: Choose your AI provider and enter your API key.
onboarding.review: Review your configuration and deploy your agent.

skills.title: Skills Marketplace
skills.subtitle: Add capabilities to your OpenClaw agent with integrations and tools.
skills.checkBack: Check back soon for new integrations and tools.
skills.howItWorksDescription: Each skill is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that extends your agent's capabilities. When you enable a skill, it's automatically configured and deployed with your OpenClaw instance. Your agent will then have access to the skill's tools and can use them to complete tasks.
